pr.title: [WIP] Build complete sticker spin wheel web game
pr.body:
- [x] Inspect current repository state and CI workflow status
- [x] Run initial baseline checks for existing code (none present yet)
- [ ] Scaffold Vite React TypeScript app and Tailwind configuration
- [ ] Implement core types, sticker data, Firebase config/firestore helpers, and hooks with Firebase/localStorage fallback
- [ ] Build UI components/pages (wheel, reveal, sticker book/cards, auth, navbar, shop) with routing and animations
- [ ] Add complete StickerSvgs.tsx exports map and favicon
- [ ] Update README and env example for Firebase/Stripe setup and webhook flow
- [ ] Run build validation, manually verify UI and capture screenshot
- [ ] Run parallel validation and address findings

<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>


## Overview
Build a complete, production-ready sticker spin wheel web game using React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion + Firebase + Stripe. Everything must look hand-crafted and polished — nothing should look AI-generated or generic. The stickers must look like they were hand-drawn/illustrated using detailed SVG art with texture, line variation, and character.

---

## Full Project Structure

```
sticker-wheel-app/
├── public/
│   └── favicon.svg
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── SpinWheel.tsx
│   │   ├── StickerBook.tsx
│   │   ├── StickerCard.tsx
│   │   ├── RarityReveal.tsx
│   │   ├── PurchaseModal.tsx
│   │   ├── AuthModal.tsx
│   │   └── Navbar.tsx
│   ├── firebase/
│   │   ├── config.ts
│   │   └── firestore.ts
│   ├── types/
│   │   └── index.ts
│   ├── data/
│   │   └── stickers.ts
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   ├── useAuth.ts
│   │   ├── useCollection.ts
│   │   └── useDailySpin.ts
│   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── HomePage.tsx
│   │   ├── BookPage.tsx
│   │   └── ShopPage.tsx
│   ├── App.tsx
│   ├── main.tsx
│   └── index.css
├── index.html
├── package.json
├── tailwind.config.js
├── postcss.config.js
├── tsconfig.json
├── vite.config.ts
├── .env.example
└── README.md
```

---

## Tech Stack

- **React 18 + TypeScript**
- **Vite** (build tool)
- **Tailwind CSS** (styling)
- **Framer Motion** (animations)
- **Firebase** (Auth + Firestore)
- **Stripe** (real purchases via Stripe Checkout — redirect to hosted Stripe page)
- **React Router v6** (page routing)

---

## package.json

```json
{
  "name": "sticker-wheel-app",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@stripe/stripe-js": "^3.0.0",
    "firebase": "^10.12.0",
    "framer-motion": "^11.0.0",
    "react": "^18.3.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.3.0",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.23.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/react": "^18.3.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.3.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.0",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.19",
    "postcss": "^8.4.38",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.3",
    "typescript": "^5.4.5",
    "vite": "^5.2.11"
  }
}
```

---

## .env.example

```env
VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=your_firebase_api_key
VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=your_project.firebaseapp.com
VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=your_project_id
VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=your_project.appspot.com
VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=your_sender_id
VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=your_app_id
VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=your_stripe_publishable_key
VITE_STRIPE_5_SPINS_PRICE_ID=price_xxxxx
VITE_STRIPE_15_SPINS_PRICE_ID=price_xxxxx
VITE_STRIPE_50_SPINS_PRICE_ID=price_xxxxx
VITE_STRIPE_SUCCESS_URL=http://localhost:5173/shop?success=true
VITE_STRIPE_CANCEL_URL=http://localhost:5173/shop?cancelled=true
```

---

## src/types/index.ts

```typescript
export type Rarity = 'common' | 'uncommon' | 'rare' | 'epic' | 'legendary';

export interface Sticker {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  rarity: Rarity;
  svgComponent: string;
  description: string;
}

export interface OwnedSticker {
  stickerId: string;
  count: number;
  firstObtained: string;
}

export interface UserProfile {
  uid: string;
  email: string;
  displayName: string;
  spins: number;
  lastDailyClaim: string | null;
  collection: OwnedSticker[];
  totalSpins: number;
}
```

---

## src/data/stickers.ts
